content_type_variable_check.name: content_type_variable_check
content_type_variable_check.value: ("dataset_variableset_contents"."content_type" != 'variable' OR ("dataset_variableset_contents"."variable_id" IS NOT NULL AND "dataset_variableset_contents"."subset_id" IS NULL))

content_type_subset_check.name: content_type_subset_check
content_type_subset_check.value: ("dataset_variableset_contents"."content_type" != 'subset' OR ("dataset_variableset_contents"."subset_id" IS NOT NULL AND "dataset_variableset_contents"."variable_id" IS NULL))
